title: Volumetric Recipe Fix
description: This data pack changes minecraft recipes to account for the volume of blocks. No more loosing resources when crafting stairs, buttons, etc!
body:
This Data Pack is meant to fix Minecraft's recipes by paying attention to the volume of the resources that go into a crafting recipe.  

now you get 8 stairs instead of 4!  
(among many other increases, and some decreases)  

This data pack increases the results of the following recipes:
- sticks
- stairs
- trapdoors
- doors
- buttons
- pressure plates
- fence & fence gate
- crafting table
- and many more!

However, to truly account for volume, some results have to be reduced, such as:
- planks
- ladders


`NOTE:` there are 2 versions of this data pack!!  
one of them limits stack sizes to 64 (or 16 when appropriate) (versions X.X.1)  
the other allows results to go over the 64 item stack limit (versions X.X.0)
